mapper.select: SELECT course_name AS courseName, ROUND(AVG(score), 2) AS avgScore, COUNT(*) AS studentCount, MAX(score) AS maxScore, MIN(score) AS minScore FROM score GROUP BY course_name ORDER BY avgScore DESC
SELECT student_code AS studentCode, student_name AS studentName, ROUND(AVG(score), 2) AS avgScore, COUNT(*) AS courseCount FROM score GROUP BY student_code, student_name ORDER BY avgScore DESC
SELECT semester, ROUND(AVG(score), 2) AS avgScore, COUNT(*) AS recordCount FROM score WHERE semester IS NOT NULL GROUP BY semester ORDER BY semester DESC

SELECT course_name AS courseName, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS passRate FROM score GROUP BY course_name ORDER BY passRate DESC

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN score >= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS excellent, SUM(CASE WHEN score >= 80 AND score < 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS good, SUM(CASE WHEN score >= 70 AND score < 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS medium, SUM(CASE WHEN score >= 60 AND score < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass, SUM(CASE WHEN score < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail, COUNT(*) AS total FROM score
